API
Claude Code
刷新
Use ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL with Kiro-Go. Set ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=true for MCP Tool Search.
client
tool_reference
mcp tools
tool trimming
tool_result turns
context reminder
responses restore
parent-agent
unsupported blocks
tool-result images
orphan tool_result
fine-grained requested
tool suppressed
Context reminders: -
Last seen: -
assistantPrefill
PARTIAL
Text prefill is converted into continuation instruction; tool-use prefill is rejected
countTokens
PARTIAL
Token counts are estimated by Kiro-Go
fineGrainedToolStreaming
PARTIAL
Anthropic SSE input_json_delta is emitted from complete Kiro tool input; true upstream partial JSON parity depends on Kiro stream shape
maxTokensZero
PARTIAL
Returns local zero-output compatibility response; not a proven upstream cache warmup
messages
PASS
/v1/messages is implemented
toolReference
PASS
tool_reference is accepted and materialized when relevant
toolSchemaValidation
PASS
Invalid model-emitted tool_use inputs are repaired or suppressed before Claude Code receives them
export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080
export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=any
export ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=true
